full_text:
Wu Xi 五習
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Xi (五習). Set fire to Emperor Xian’s lodgings but later turned and killed Guo Si. Wu Xi was affiliated with Guo Si and the Han Dynasty.
